title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: He refused our invitation to the dinner party.

questions.firstSentence: Workers are repairing the road outside.
I'm sure she has already left the office.
The concert hall was so full that people were standing.
questions.secondSentence: There was (1) _________ that people were standing.

questions.firstSentence: I haven't spoken to my old friend for years.
questions.secondSentence: I last spoke to my old friend (1) _________ years.

questions.firstSentence: He managed to escape from the burning building.
She was forced to resign from her job.
